Bash(node -e "const os = require\(''os''\); const fs = require\(''fs''\); const home = os.homedir\(\); console.log\(''Home:'', home\); try { const items = fs.readdirSync\(home, { withFileTypes: true }\); console.log\(''Items:'', items.filter\(i => !i.name.startsWith\(''.''\)\).slice\(0, 5\).map\(i => i.name\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''Error:'', e.message\); }")
